Code Index References are to text pages. Boldface* page numbers indicate the pages on which the primary code descriptions reside. Current Procedural Terminology (CPT) codes begin on this page; International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM) codes begin on page 576; Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS)* codes begin on page 579; and modifiers begin on page 580.
